mapper.insert:
insert into sms_skd_rule_item (staff_id, days_of_week, status, sk_limit, sk_rule_id) values
(#{it.staffId}, #{it.daysOfWeek}, #{it.status}, #{it.skLimit}, #{it.skRuleId})
mapper.select: select id, staff_id as staffId, days_of_week as daysOfWeek, status, sk_limit as skLimit, sk_rule_id as skRuleId from sms_skd_rule_item where sk_rule_id = #{skRuleId} order by staff_id asc
